name: @bkrdy/platform
description: BookReady template marketplace platform — manifest types, design tokens, PlatformBookingFlow, CustomerAuth, and the shared CSS that every marketplace template builds against.
_notes: This package is consumed by the BookReady web app via a TypeScript path alias (see web/tsconfig.json) — NOT installed via npm yet. Phase 1 of the marketplace plan publishes it to npm so 3rd-party creators can `npm install @bkrdy/platform`. The 'exports' map above is the published contract creators will see; we author against it now so the cutover is transparent.
